mechanism: Extreme concentration (30-38% top 10) creates mechanical divergence between cap-weighted and equal-weighted metrics. Cap-weighted P/E, ERP, stock-bond correlation, and earnings revision breadth all differ materially from equal-weighted equivalents, masking the cycle state of the median company.
regime_dependence: Divergence increases with concentration level. Currently at historically extreme divergence. Converges during concentration unwinds (historically via large-cap decline, not small-cap catch-up).
